prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

(register_shutdown_scope support_production_line)
(register_shutdown_scope turnover_zone_alpha)
(register_shutdown_scope turnover_zone_beta)
(allocate_assignable_resource_to_campaign primary_production_line turnover_resource_alpha)
(allocate_assignable_resource_to_campaign support_production_line turnover_resource_beta)
(allocate_assignable_resource_to_campaign turnover_zone_alpha turnover_resource_gamma)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(activate_shutdown_scope primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(release_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(stage_primary_line_consumable_kit primary_production_line primary_line_hold_point cleaning_kit)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(complete_primary_line_shutdown primary_production_line primary_line_hold_point shutdown_task_template cleaning_kit)
(release_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(activate_shutdown_scope support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(release_shutdown_task_template support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(stage_support_line_consumable_kit support_production_line support_line_hold_point cleaning_kit)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(complete_support_line_shutdown support_production_line support_line_hold_point shutdown_task_template cleaning_kit)
(release_shutdown_task_template support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(assemble_turnover_record primary_production_line support_production_line primary_line_hold_point support_line_hold_point turnover_record_alpha)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(seal_turnover_record turnover_record_alpha primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(mark_primary_line_release_ready primary_production_line turnover_record_alpha)
(mark_support_line_release_ready support_production_line turnover_record_alpha)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template turnover_zone_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(activate_shutdown_scope turnover_zone_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(assign_cleaning_procedure_to_zone turnover_zone_alpha cleaning_procedure_run)
(assign_compliance_audit_item_to_zone turnover_zone_alpha compliance_audit_item_alpha)
(assign_specialist_team_to_campaign turnover_zone_alpha engineering_support_team)
(bind_checklist_document_to_zone turnover_zone_alpha turnover_checklist_alpha turnover_record_alpha)
(verify_checklist_document turnover_zone_alpha turnover_checklist_alpha turnover_record_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(open_zone_final_review turnover_zone_alpha cleaning_procedure_run engineering_support_team turnover_checklist_alpha turnover_record_alpha)
(approve_zone_final_review turnover_zone_alpha compliance_audit_item_alpha turnover_checklist_alpha turnover_record_alpha)
(finalize_zone_release turnover_zone_alpha)
(release_specialist_team_from_campaign turnover_zone_alpha engineering_support_team)
(release_cleaning_procedure_from_zone turnover_zone_alpha cleaning_procedure_run)
(release_compliance_audit_item_from_zone turnover_zone_alpha compliance_audit_item_alpha)
(issue_release_certificate turnover_zone_alpha release_certificate_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(return_turnover_zone_resource_to_pool turnover_zone_alpha turnover_resource_gamma release_certificate_alpha)
(release_shutdown_task_template turnover_zone_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(allocate_assignable_resource_to_campaign turnover_zone_beta turnover_resource_gamma)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template turnover_zone_beta shutdown_task_template)
(activate_shutdown_scope turnover_zone_beta shutdown_task_template)
(assign_cleaning_procedure_to_zone turnover_zone_beta cleaning_procedure_run)
(assign_compliance_audit_item_to_zone turnover_zone_beta compliance_audit_item_alpha)
(assign_specialist_team_to_campaign turnover_zone_beta engineering_support_team)
(bind_checklist_document_to_zone turnover_zone_beta turnover_checklist_beta turnover_record_alpha)
(verify_checklist_document turnover_zone_beta turnover_checklist_beta turnover_record_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(open_zone_final_review turnover_zone_beta cleaning_procedure_run engineering_support_team turnover_checklist_beta turnover_record_alpha)
(approve_zone_final_review turnover_zone_beta compliance_audit_item_alpha turnover_checklist_beta turnover_record_alpha)
(finalize_zone_release turnover_zone_beta)
(release_specialist_team_from_campaign turnover_zone_beta engineering_support_team)
(release_cleaning_procedure_from_zone turnover_zone_beta cleaning_procedure_run)
(release_compliance_audit_item_from_zone turnover_zone_beta compliance_audit_item_alpha)
(issue_release_certificate turnover_zone_beta release_certificate_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(return_turnover_zone_resource_to_pool turnover_zone_beta turnover_resource_gamma release_certificate_alpha)
(release_shutdown_task_template turnover_zone_beta shutdown_task_template)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template primary_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(issue_release_certificate primary_production_line release_certificate_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(return_primary_line_resource_to_pool primary_production_line turnover_resource_alpha release_certificate_alpha)
(reserve_shutdown_task_template support_production_line shutdown_task_template)
(issue_release_certificate support_production_line release_certificate_alpha shutdown_task_template)
(return_support_line_resource_to_pool support_production_line turnover_resource_beta release_certificate_alpha)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a campaign shutdown turnover planning domain. The goal is to make four entities complete their shutdown: primary_production_line, support_production_line, turnover_zone_alpha, and turnover_zone_beta.


## Examining Shutdown Entities  
- The task centers on a campaign shutdown with four entities needing completion: primary_production_line, support_production_line, turnover_zone_alpha, and turnover_zone_beta.  
- The goal is to ensure all entities are fully shut down as part of the turnover planning process.

## Examining Shutdown Entities  
- The system includes two production lines (primary and support) and two turnover zones (alpha and beta), all needing shutdown.  
- Turnover zones share the turnover_record_alpha, indicating a shared resource for tracking.  

## Identifying Available Resources  
- Initial setup shows authorization_token_alpha is available, but authorization_token_beta is not, despite being bound to turnover_zone_beta.  
- Compliance_audit_item_alpha is available, suggesting initial compliance checks are in place for some processes.  

## Outlining Shutdown Process  
- The shutdown process for scopes (lines and zones) involves registering, allocating resources, reserving task templates, and activating.  
- For lines, shutdown may require holding points, consumables, specialist teams, and task templates, with options like preparing with specialists or staging consumables.  

## Exploring Line Shutdown Details  
- Shutting down a line, like the primary production line, involves clearing holds, starting shutdown, and completing it to release resources.  
- Different combinations of actions, such as opening holds or staging consumables, can be used to achieve shutdown, affecting resource availability.

## Exploring Line Shutdown Paths  
- Shutting down lines like the primary production line involves multiple steps, including opening holds and preparing shutdowns, often without needing consumables initially.  
- Actions like staging consumables can clear holds and start shutdown, while completing shutdown reopens holds and makes lines ready, releasing resources.  

## Analyzing Record Compilation  
- Compiling turnover records requires lines to be started, holds open, and both ready, using actions like assemble_turnover_record.  
- Record status can be compiled via hold point checks, leading to review pending states for primary or support lines, depending on hold conditions.  

## Detailing Zone Shutdown Processes  
- Zones require additional steps like assigning cleaning, conducting compliance audits, and binding checklists, alongside final reviews for completion.  
- Achieving release_ready for zones involves finalizing reviews, resolving conditions, or closing with signoff, often needing active authorization.

## Planning Resource Allocation  
- Start by registering all shutdown scopes, including primary and support production lines and turnover zones, ensuring no conflicts.  
- Allocate available resources, such as turnover_resource_alpha, to scopes like primary_production_line, committing them for use.  

## Managing Task Reservations  
- Reserve shutdown task templates for scopes, like primary_production_line, making the task unavailable until released.  
- Activate scopes using reserved tasks, but tasks remain reserved, requiring a release step, such as release_shutdown_task_template, to make them available again.  

## Sequencing Line Shutdowns  
- Consider activating both lines sequentially by reserving and releasing the shared task, ensuring each line reaches an active state.  
- Explore using consumable paths, like stage_primary_line_consumable_kit, to clear holds without needing specialists, simplifying shutdown processes.

## Managing Zone Activation  
- Zones like A and B need resources allocated, such as cleaning and compliance, to start shutdown processes.  
- Assigning spares, like spare_alpha to zone A, makes them unavailable for other zones until released.  

## Binding Zone Checklists  
- Binding checklists, like checklist_alpha, to zone A’s record logs details and marks it unavailable for other uses.  
- Verifying checklists requires an active zone, a bound checklist, and a reserved task to mark documentation as verified.  

## Finalizing Zone Reviews  
- Assigning specialist teams to zones, like team to zone A, is needed before opening final reviews.  
- Approving final reviews, with attached compliance and no pending issues, marks zones complete and release-ready.  

## Planning Resource Release  
- Issuing release certificates for zones, like zone A, requires release-ready status and a reserved task, using shared certificates.  
- Returning zone resources to the pool, such as its_resource for zone A, happens after certificate issuance, freeing them for other zones.

## Extending Zone Processes  
- After finalizing zone A, allocate resource gamma to zone B, committing it and making gamma unavailable.  
- Reserve a task for zone B and activate it, ensuring B follows a similar process to A for shutdown.  

## Releasing Zone Resources  
- Release cleaning and compliance procedures from zone A after approval, making them available for zone B.  
- Assign these released resources to zone B, along with binding checklist_beta and verifying documentation.  

## Finalizing Zone B  
- Assign a specialist team to zone B, released from A, and open the final review without support pending.  
- Approve zone B’s final review, issue a certificate with a reserved task, and return resource gamma, marking B complete.  

## Managing Line Certifications  
- Reserve tasks for primary and support production lines, issuing certificates and associating them with the lines.  
- Return line resources to the pool after certification, completing the process and making resources available again.

## Sequencing Line Shutdowns  
- Both primary (P) and support (S) production lines must stage and complete before assembling, using a shared kit that's unavailable during staging.  
- Staging a line, like P, clears holds, starts the process, and assigns the kit, but completing it requires a reserved task, which creates conflicts if both lines need tasks simultaneously.  

## Resolving Task Conflicts  
- Activating a line, such as P, reserves its task, making it unavailable for S, leading to a deadlock since completing P also requires the task to stay reserved.  
- Releasing P’s task before completing it isn't possible, as completion needs the reserved task, suggesting a need for an alternative shutdown path without simultaneous task reservation.  

## Exploring Shutdown Alternatives  
- Preparing a line for shutdown, like using prepare_primary_line_shutdown, makes it ready but requires holds to be open, which in turn needs a reserved task.  
- Staging clears holds without needing a reserved task, but completing to make a line ready still requires task reservation, complicating simultaneous line shutdowns.  

## Analyzing Record Requirements  
- Recording actions, like record_primary_hold_point_status, needs both lines ready, with S’s hold open, which requires reserving S’s task, exacerbating the task availability issue.  
- Achieving ready status for S without completing P is challenging, as staging alone doesn’t make a line ready, and completing requires a reserved task, leading to potential deadlocks.

## Processing Zone Shutdowns  
- Reserve a shutdown task for zone A, activate it, and assign cleaning, compliance, and a specialist team for preparation.  
- Bind and verify a checklist document for zone A, ensuring it's active, associated, and logged, marking it as document-verified.  

## Finalizing Zone Reviews  
- Open zone A's final review after verification, with cleaning attached and a team assigned, ensuring no support pending.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
